page: Microsoft Azure F8ads_v7 is an x86_64 architecture server powered by an AMD EPYC 9V45 processor. It features 8 dedicated physical cores and 8 vCPUs operating at a clock speed of 4.5 GHz. The hardware configuration includes 32.0 GB of system memory, providing 4.0 GB of RAM per core, and 945 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capability. The CPU cache configuration consists of 48 KB L1d, 1.0 MB L2, and 32 MB L3 cache.

In benchmark testing, the F8ads_v7 demonstrates top-tier single-core performance. Single-threaded stress-ng CPU tests, gzip compression, and bzip3 decompression all rank in the top 10% of tested servers. Multi-core performance, memory bandwidth, and database operations fall within the average range. For machine learning workloads, the server achieves top-tier performance in text generation for small LLM models at 358.88 tokens per second, while prompt processing for medium models remains average at 57.28 tokens per second.

Given its dedicated high-frequency AMD EPYC cores and bundled 945 GB local storage, the F8ads_v7 offers a balanced resource density for compute-intensive workloads that require fast local scratch space. The absence of a GPU limits its utility for large-scale deep learning, but its strong single-core speed and dedicated CPU allocation make it highly suitable for web serving, single-threaded data processing, small-scale LLM inference, and database operations.
description: Microsoft Azure F8ads_v7 is an x86_64 compute-optimized server featuring 8 dedicated AMD EPYC 9V45 physical cores running at 4.5 GHz. It is equipped with 32.0 GB of RAM and 945 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capability. Benchmark results show top-tier single-core performance, particularly in single-threaded stress-ng tests, gzip compression, and small-model LLM text generation. Multi-core performance, memory bandwidth, and database operations perform in the average tier. Lacking a GPU, this server is designed for workloads requiring high clock speeds and fast local storage, such as web serving, single-threaded data processing, and database operations.
og_description: Microsoft Azure F8ads_v7 is an 8-vCPU server featuring a 4.5 GHz AMD EPYC 9V45 processor, 32 GB RAM, and 945 GB local storage, delivering top-tier single-core and small-model LLM performance.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure F8ads_v7 features 8 dedicated AMD EPYC cores at 4.5 GHz, 32 GB RAM, and 945 GB local storage for high-performance compute workloads.
tagline: A high-frequency dedicated AMD processor server with fast local storage, optimized for single-threaded performance and compute-intensive workloads.
bullet_points: AMD EPYC 9V45 processor with 8 dedicated cores running at 4.5 GHz
32.0 GB of system memory and 945 GB of local storage
Top-tier single-core CPU performance and single-threaded compression speeds
Strong text generation speeds for small-scale language models
Suited for web serving, database operations, and single-threaded processing
